stemHtml: In a skidding turn (the nose pointing inwards), compared with a co-ordinated turn, the bank angle (i) and the "ball" or slip indicator (ii) are respectively…

options.a: (i) too large, (ii) displaced towards the low wing.
options.b: (i) too small, (ii) displaced towards the low wing.
options.c: (i) too small, (ii) displaced towards the high wing.
options.d: (i) too large, (ii) displaced towards the high wing.
